mapper.select: SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.name AS role_name FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id ORDER BY u.id
SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.name AS role_name FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.id = #{id}

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.create_time, u.update_time, r.name AS role_name FROM user u LEFT JOIN user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN role r ON ur.role_id = r.id WHERE u.username = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user (username, password, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{createdTime}, #{updatedTime})
INSERT INTO new_save (news_title, news_type, value_html, create_time) VALUES (#{newsTitle}, #{newsType}, #{valueHtml}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, news_title as newsTitle, news_type as newsType, value_html as valueHtml, create_time as createTime FROM new_save ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, news_title as newsTitle, news_type as newsType, value_html as valueHtml, create_time as createTime FROM new_save WHERE news_type = #{newsType} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT id, news_title as newsTitle, news_type as newsType, value_html as valueHtml, create_time as createTime FROM new_save WHERE id = #{id}
